content:
# Session 41 (iter-041) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- **Stage:** prover (`mathlib-build`). Lane = **strand-(b) brick 1 ‚Äî `internalHom : X.Modules ‚•§ X.Modules`** (foundation for a REAL `relExt`, the path to closing 1.10 `ext_finite_flat`).
- **Sorry: 1 ‚Üí 1** (unchanged; this iter adds infrastructure, not a sorry-close). Lone sorry: `ext_finite_flat` (Basic.lean:~2712).
- **Axioms: 27 ‚Üí 27 `External.*`** (no new axiom; build is axiom-clean infra). New decls `#print axioms` = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`.
- **Build:** `lake build MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.Basic` exit 0 (8475 jobs, 86s). `lean_verify` clean (`sorryAx` only from `ext_finite_flat`).
- **Headline:** Per-section module structure for internal-hom sections **built axiom-clean** ‚Äî `homModuleOverGlobalSections : Module Œì(Y,‚ä§) (M‚ü∂N)` + `linearOverGlobalSections : Linear Œì(Y,‚ä§) Y.Modules` (2 non-private instances + 6 private helpers). The `internalHom` **functor** was correctly **NOT fabricated** ‚Äî confirmed a genuine multi-iter from-scratch Mathlib-gap layer (feasibility gate fired as planned).

## Target: `internalHom` brick 1 (strand-(b))

### Attempt 1 ‚Äî Mathlib reuse search (FAILED ‚Üí confirmed gap)
- `lean_loogle`: `PresheafOfModules.internalHom`, `SheafOfModules.internalHom`, `MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules _)`, `PresheafOfModules.ihom` ‚Üí all "No results found".
- `grep ihom|internalHom|MonoidalClosed|sheafHom|homObj` over `Mathlib/Algebra/Category/ModuleCat/{Presheaf,Sheaf}/` + `AlgebraicGeometry/Modules/` ‚Üí empty. No `Linear` instance on either; no over-open restriction functor.
- **Learned:** internal-hom for `(Pre)SheafOfModules` is genuinely absent in Mathlib v4.30.0; must build from scratch. Same boundary class as the affine-ess-surj / j_! / monoidal-tensor layers.

### Attempt 2 ‚Äî per-section module structure (SOLVED, axiom-clean)
- `homModuleOverGlobalSections {Y} {M N : Y.Modules} : Module Œì(Y,‚ä§) (M‚ü∂N)` (Basic.lean:1093). `r : Œì(Y,‚ä§)` acts on `œÜ:M‚ü∂N` by `‚ü®internalHomSmulVal r œÜ‚ü©`, scaling each `œÜ.val.app U` by `r|_U` (`globalSectionRestrict r U`).
- **Key idiom:** structure sheaf is `RingCat`-valued (forgets commutativity), so Mathlib's `Linear`-over-`CommRing` on `ModuleCat` hom-sets is unavailable on `SheafOfModules` hom-sets. Recover the per-open `CommRing` via `letI : CommRing ‚Üë(Y.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj U) := inferInstanceAs (CommRing Œì(Y, U.unop))` (defeq to the carrier ‚Äî verified).
- Module axioms (`one_smul`/`mul_smul`/`smul_add`/`add_smul`/`smul_zero`/`zero_smul`): each `apply SheafOfModules.hom_ext; apply PresheafOfModules.hom_ext; intro X; letI <CommRing>; change <section-level smul eq>; rw [globalSectionRestrict_<op>, <ModuleCat smul lemma>]`.

### Attempt 3 ‚Äî naturality of the scalar action (SOLVED)
- `internalHomSmulVal` (Basic.lean:1070) naturality closed by:
  `rw [‚Üê globalSectionRestrict_naturality r f, restrictScalars_map_smul (RingCat.Hom.hom (Y.ringCatSheaf.obj.map f)) (globalSectionRestrict r U) (œÜ.val.app V), Linear.comp_smul, œÜ.val.naturality f, Linear.smul_comp]`.
- `globalSectionRestrict_naturality` (global section restriction commutes with `R.map f`): `rw [‚Üê CategoryTheory.comp_apply, ‚Üê Y.ringCatSheaf.obj.map_comp]; congr 1` (uniqueness of `Opens` morphism into `‚ä§`).
- `restrictScalars_map_smul` (`(restrictScalars g).map (g a ‚Ä¢ h) = a ‚Ä¢ (restrictScalars g).map h`): pointwise via `ModuleCat.hom_ext; LinearMap.ext; rw [restrictScalars.map_apply]; change ‚Ä¶; rw [restrictScalars.map_apply, restrictScalars.smul_def (M:=Q)]; simp`.

### Attempt 4 ‚Äî category-level linearity (SOLVED, axiom-clean)
- `linearOverGlobalSections {Y} : Linear Œì(Y,‚ä§) Y.Modules` (Basic.lean:1136). `smul_comp`/`comp_smul` by `hom_ext` to section level + `Linear.smul_comp`/`Linear.comp_smul` on `ModuleCat`.

### `internalHom` functor ‚Äî NOT added (feasibility verdict: multi-iter layer)
Remaining sub-bricks, each substantial + absent (per task_result):
- **(2)** semilinear restriction maps `(I|_U‚ü∂M|_U)‚Üí(I|_V‚ü∂M|_V)` via `Scheme.Modules.pullback (incl:‚ÜëV‚ü∂‚ÜëU)` + transport through `pullbackComp`, assembled into a `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` with semilinear restriction over `Œì(X,U)‚ÜíŒì(X,V)`. The `pullbackComp` coherence bookkeeping on hom-objects is the bulk (‚â•1‚Äì2 iters).
- **(3)** sheaf condition (morphisms of sheaves glue) ‚Üí package as `SheafOfModules` (‚â•1 iter).
- **(4)** functoriality in `M` (postcomposition) ‚Üí the endofunctor.
- **(5)** `Additive` instance.
- **Verdict:** buildable but ‚â•3‚Äì4 more iters. Anchoring `relExt`/`IsLFPAndFlatOn` stays UNSOUND (restates 1.10); an opaque def gives the 1.8/1.9 assembly no API. So the build is the only sound path; this iter is permanent progress on it.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Module over global sections on `SheafOfModules` hom-sets** ‚Äî see Knowledge Base (recover per-open `CommRing` via `inferInstanceAs`; section-wise `hom_ext`‚Üí`hom_ext`‚ÜíModuleCat smul lemmas; semilinear-restriction compat `restrictScalars_map_smul`).
- The feasibility gate worked exactly as the @041 plan intended: prover reported `internalHom` is a multi-iter layer rather than fabricating a stub or sorry-padding.

## Process notes
- 72 events: 3 edits, 4 diagnostic checks (2 clean), 14 lemma searches, several `lean_run_code` REPL probes (scaffolding the module instance), 0 standalone builds shown but 2 whole-file `lake build` exit 0. 1 transient error (rate-limit on loogle), self-handled. No sorry-grind, no fabrication.
- `sync_leanok`: iter=41, sha 11a8ca1, added=0, removed=0 ‚Äî consistent (new decls are instances/helpers, no blueprint proof block claims them yet). No laundering.
- `dag-query`: **gaps=0**; **unmatched=10** (the 6 private helpers + 2 instances + `internalHomSmulVal` + `globalSectionRestrict_zero`) ‚Üí coverage debt, listed in `recommendations.md`.
- Doctor: 27 `External.*` re-flagged (intentional EGA/OB/monoidal boundary; +0 this iter). No orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `def:internalHom` block exists with `\lean{‚Ä¶internalHom}` but the functor is unbuilt ‚Üí correctly left unmarked. The 2 new instances + helpers have no blueprint block yet (coverage debt ‚Äî planner authors, see recommendations). No `\mathlibok` candidates (all new decls are project-local Mathlib-gap fills, not Mathlib re-exports). No `\lean{}` renames, no stale `\notready`.

## Subagent skips
- All review subagents disabled (classic single-agent loop; catalog has none enabled). No `[MANDATORY]` review subagent. A single axiom-clean infra round, covered by `lean_verify` + `dag-query` + doctor. No dispatch warranted.

## Convergence verdict
- **Genuine, on-plan progress** with the feasibility gate firing correctly. Sorry flat at 1 (expected ‚Äî infra iter, not a close). The brick-1 foundation (per-section module structure) is permanent reusable substrate. **Convergence watch:** strand-(b) is a declared ~8‚Äì16-iter build; this is iter 1 of brick 1 and the functor alone is ‚â•3‚Äì4 iters. If the planner wants a faster milestone, the ¬ß1-strand-(a)-as-stopping-point option is live in `TO_USER.md` (user steers via `USER_HINTS.md`). Next iter: brick 1 sub-brick (2) (restriction maps + presheaf assembly), reusing `homModuleOverGlobalSections` at `Y:=‚ÜëU`.
